pi_items.source: Verified by checking verifier.py logic which requires "awakening" and one of the chapter keywords.
Calculated by multiplying the requested timecodes in the synthetic production brief (0s, 2s, 10s, 18s, 28s) by the session sample rate of 44100 Hz.
Calculated by multiplying the requested start time of 0:05 by 44100 Hz.
Calculated by multiplying the requested end time of 0:20 by 44100 Hz.
Matches verifier.py explicit tolerance value, equating to 1.5 seconds at 44100 Hz.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is entirely synthetic and dynamically generated by setup scripts. The expected point markers at samples [0, 88200, 441000, 793800, 1234800] perfectly match the required timecodes (0, 2, 10, 18, 28 seconds) given the 44100 Hz session rate. The expected range marker at samples [220500, 882000] similarly matches the 5-to-20 seconds requirement. The track naming requirements and verifier tolerances exactly match the verifier logic.
